name: latextoolbox
description: Convenient tools for writing LaTeX in VS Code.

latexToolBox.clipboardImage.directory.description: Directory, relative to the active .tex file, where clipboard images are saved.

latexToolBox.clipboardImage.template.description: Snippet template inserted after saving the clipboard image. Available placeholders: ${path}, ${filename}, ${basename}, ${width}.

latexToolBox.clipboardImage.width.description: Default width value used by ${width} in the clipboard image template.

latexToolBox.insertImage.template.description: Snippet template inserted after choosing an image file. Available placeholders: ${path}, ${filename}, ${basename}, ${width}.

latexToolBox.insertImage.width.description: Default width value used by ${width} in the file image template.

latexToolBox.wrapFigure.position.description: Default wrapfigure placement. Common values are r for right and l for left.

latexToolBox.wrapFigure.width.description: Default width argument used by the wrapfigure environment.

latexToolBox.wrapFigure.includeGraphicsW.description: Width value applied to \includegraphics inside the wrapfigure environment.

latexToolBox.wrapFigure.updateIncludeGra.description: Replace or add the width option on \includegraphics when converting a selection to wrapfigure.

latexToolBox.wrapFigure.addPackage.description: Automatically add \usepackage{wrapfig} to the preamble when missing.
